title: CMS
description: This project contains a repository that lives at https://github.com/diramazioni/smdoc that let the user or the agent manage Markdoc easly using the Svelte 5 framework.
instructions:
Use Svelte 5 ruines/patterns. Don't use $effect() for side effects-
For every change made in the code-base push to a different branch that starts with 'a0_' prefix and make a pull request.
digiteco is a special branch that holds customization for a customer, I will create a other branches that will need to be keep in sync with the master

file_structure.gitignore:
# Python environments & cache
venv/**
**/__pycache__/**

# Node.js dependencies
**/node_modules/**
**/.npm/**

# Version control metadata
**/.git/**
